name: Planet Destruction
author: Poki
description: Planet Destruction is a chaotic sandbox game where you unleash insanely powerful weapons to blow entire planets to pieces! Blast worlds with lasers, space mines, and other devastating tools—each one creating its own spectacular destruction in real time. Watch continents crumble, atmospheres burn, and civilizations disappear as you wreak cosmic havoc. Ready to destroy the universe one planet at a time? How to play Planet Destruction? Click or tap to play! Who created Planet Destruction? Planet Destruction is created by Boop Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Planet Destruction for free? You can play Planet Destruction for free on Poki. Can I play Planet Destruction on mobile devices and desktop? Planet Destruction can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
